title: In silico analysis of DNA variants
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7qdj","text":"In order to determine the consequence of ILDR1 reported mutations on splicing and translation initiation, we used Human Splicing Finder (version 3.0) (http://www.umd.be/HSF3/) and ORF finder (http://www.geneinfinity.org/sms/sms_orffinder.html) respectively.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":41,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
